headline: Dow Jumps 200 Points After Fed-Related Sell-Off – Index On Track To Post Best Week In A Month
summary: U.S. stocks rose in early Thursday trading, rebounding from the previous session’s Fed-driven selloff as falling oil prices and optimism surrounding the Iran peace deal boosted investor sentiment.

headline: Biogen to Strengthen Immunology Pipeline With $1B RayThera Buyout
summary: BIIB is set to acquire RayThera for up to $1 billion, adding anti-inflammatory candidates that could expand its immunology pipeline and future growth.

headline: GSK's Utebzi Wins FDA Nod for Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
summary: GSK wins FDA approval for Utebzi, the first oral carbapenem for complicated UTIs, further expanding its anti-infectives portfolio.

headline: Portal Biotechnologies Accelerates Growth with Latest Round Led by NFX, Expanded DARPA Contract, and Broad Adoption Across Top Pharma and Academic Centers
summary: WATERTOWN, Mass., June 18, 2026--Today, Portal Biotechnologies, Inc. ("Portal"), a cell engineering and drug discovery platform company, announced updates on significant commercial progress and the closing of an oversubscribed $9M financing round led by NFX and participation from existing investors including IA Ventures, Pear VC, Undeterred Ventures, IKJ Capital, and TechU Ventures.
